app.title: skills manager
app.subtitle: Skill asset control center across agents
app.shellHint: Phase 1 currently includes the app shell, settings, scan foundation, and task bus.

topbar.searchPlaceholder: Search pages, skills, or settings (coming soon)

overview.title: Asset Overview
overview.description: This dashboard shows foundational insight into local skill assets, risks, duplicate paths, and recent tasks.
overview.recentTasksHint: The task center will show scan, install, distribute, and template injection progress.
overview.moduleStatusHint: Scan results and task events are real. Other governance capabilities are still unavailable or coming soon.
overview.moduleStatusNotice: Marketplace install, multi-target distribution, and template injection are not connected to real workflows yet. This page now shows only real scan results and task events instead of fake success states.
overview.metricsNotice: A “—” in the top summary cards means the metric is not connected yet, so the UI no longer pretends that zero is a real result.
overview.projectsEmpty: No project-level configuration has been detected yet. Add project roots in Settings first.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.description: This phase focuses on real scan results and managed-state boundaries. Install and distribution flows come next.
skills.empty: No skills discovered yet. Run a scan first.

market.title: Market
market.description: Marketplace aggregation will be connected in the next phase. This page preserves the structure and entry point.

security.title: Security
security.description: The security engine will be enabled in the next phase. For now, observe the scan foundation through the task center.
security.notConnectedDescription: This phase keeps the information architecture and entry point only. Fake risk counts are no longer shown; real results will appear after scan rules, scoring, and blocking are fully connected.

safe.label: Safe / Low
safe.title: Waiting for real scan results
safe.description: Real safe and low-risk counts will appear only after the security rules engine is connected.

medium.label: Medium
medium.title: Waiting for risk scoring
medium.description: The UI no longer shows a fake 0 for medium-risk skills. Future work will expose matched rules and recommended actions.

blocked.label: Blocked
blocked.title: Waiting for blocking workflow
blocked.description: High-risk blocking is not implemented yet. Future results will include blocking reasons, logs, and recovery guidance.

settings.title: Settings & Governance
settings.description: Manage language, theme, project roots, and custom scan roots here.

tasks.title: Task Center
tasks.empty: There are no active tasks right now.

common.name: Name
